Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Cruel Navigation
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Pack Size: +29% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +15% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +85% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 79
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 216(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +24(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Prefix Modifier "Infernal" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 18(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Fire
{ Prefix Modifier "Precise" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 33(30-40)% increased Accuracy Rating
{ Suffix Modifier "of Evasion" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters are Evasive
{ Suffix Modifier "of Drought" (Tier: 1) }
Players gain 33(35-30)% reduced Flask Charges
{ Suffix Modifier "Flaming" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Ignited Ground
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
